title: athlete-guardian — compliance evidence
description: AthleteGuardian is legal-custody + safeguarding-adjacent. Every guardianship record, verification event, and role-flag change is compliance-relevant. GDPR Art. 8 (parental consent), COPPA, FERPA (school-type tenants), SOC 2 CC6.3, anti-fraud (verification workflow prevents unauthorised claim of guardianship).

controls.evidence: AthleteGuardian is the source of truth for who can record consents for a minor athlete. The `has_legal_custody=true` flag + `verification_status='verified'` are prerequisites for the athlete-consent module to accept a consent record. The cross-module rule `consent_recorded_by_authorised_guardian` chains through ConsentDelegationChain.
Guardian rows cascade with parent Athlete hard-delete. Revoked guardians retain 7 years for audit.

For US tenants with athletes under 13, the `athlete_guardian_verification` entitlement (Enterprise) + HR-verified workflow with signed-document upload satisfies COPPA's verifiable-consent requirement. Enforced by athlete::consent_recorded_by_authorised_guardian rule in Wave 3b.

controls.principle: parent access to education records (US school tenants)
controls.evidence: Guardians with `has_legal_custody=true` inherit parent-access rights per FERPA. The .own scope for guardians resolves against active + verified rows.
`athlete_guardians.verify` + `.dispute` + `.revoke` are HR + safeguarding_officer + owner only. Branch managers CANNOT unilaterally dispute or revoke (retaliation safeguard).
ReconcilePrimaryGuardianInvariantJob is the P1 signal — every finding is investigated. `academorix.athlete_guardian.primary.invariant_violations` should stay at 0.
`can_pickup` toggle is audited on every change. Reception staff verify against the cache before releasing a minor to an adult.
`can_authorise_medical_care` requires `has_legal_custody=true`. Every change is audited with 7-year retention. Emergency medical decisions route through this list.
The three verification paths (auto-household / hr-manual / silent-acceptance) all leave a compliance trail. Disputed guardians BLOCK from consent recording — the safeguard against fraudulent claims.
